name: Orange Glazed Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Orange Juice, Frozen Concentrate, undiluted
6 Chicken Breasts Without Skin, excess fat removed - boneless
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine thawed orange juice and marjoram in a shallow dish.
2. Dip each breast in the orange juice mixture.
3. Place the breasts in the Crockpot.
4. Pour remaining sauce over the breasts.
5. Cover; cook on Low for 7-9 hours (High: 4-5 hours).
